summary: Added a stale-manifest guard to validate_asset_references so non-empty question-bank image fields must also appear in asset_manifest.v1.json canonical_path entries when a manifest is loaded.
test_results: The new targeted test failed before implementation with report['ok'] still true. After implementation, tests/test_asset_manifest_storage_audit.py passed: 4 passed. The targeted output-contract/readiness/audit pytest gate passed: 59 passed, 5 warnings. The live scripts/validate_asset_references.py gate failed because output/json/asset_manifest.v1.json and several output/asterion/topic-routing validation inputs are missing in the current workspace.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: validate_asset_references emits missing_question_bank_manifest_path when a question-bank image path exists on disk but is absent from the loaded manifest canonical_path set.
Satisfied: the new error includes question_id, field, and path details.
Satisfied: existing valid manifest/question-bank fixture still passes.
Satisfied: no output/, data/, or input/ generated artifacts were modified by this iteration.
deviations_from_plan: The live asset-reference project gate could not pass because required generated validation inputs are absent from the repo workspace.
src/exam_bank/asset_manifest.py already had pre-existing dirty changes before this iteration; the iteration worked in that file without reverting them.
repo_hygiene_notes: Loop artifacts were written only under .agent-runs/2026-06-18T22-15-18-167Z/iteration-01/. The new-run script also created .agent-runs/latest, run-state.json, and empty iteration directories as part of the configured loop setup. No dependency or generated output changes were added.
known_risks: The validator now emits one missing_question_bank_manifest_path error per missing question-bank field occurrence; the same missing path can appear through canonical and legacy/list fields.
The full generated-output validation gate remains blocked until the expected asset manifest and Asterion/topic-routing output files are present or intentionally made optional.
